```json
]
```

**Explanation**

The name of each location was extracted from the caption using the `.text` attribute. The full address was extracted by combining the name of the location with the name of the region or country in which it is located. The order of each location was extracted by counting the number of times the location was mentioned in the caption.

For example, the name of the first location is "Wales". The full address is "Wales, United Kingdom". The order is 1, because the location is mentioned first in the caption.

The same process was applied to both locations. The resulting JSON file contains a list of objects, each of which contains the name, full address, and order of a location.
